subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Burhan (= Lawh-i-Raqsha?)
subcodes.first_line: The winds of hatred have encompassed the Ark of Baṭḥá, by reason of that which the hands of the oppressors have wrought
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد احاطت اریاح البغضا سفینه البطحا بما اکتسبت ایدی الظالمین یا باقر قد افتیت
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @empty learning; false spirituality, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @chastisement and requital, @rejection, opposition and persecution
